title: hymenophyllum walleri
intro: Hymenophyllum walleri, also known as Waller's filmy fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum walleri include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair. Hymenophyllum walleri is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and poultices, to support skin health and promote wound healing.
